stories.original_headline: A giant blade-crested spinosaurus, the “hell heron,” discovered in the Sahara
stories.original_summary: Deep in the heart of the Sahara, scientists have uncovered Spinosaurus mirabilis — a spectacular new predator crowned with a massive, scimitar-shaped crest that may once have blazed with color under the desert sun. Discovered in remote inland river deposits in Niger, the fossil rewrites what we thou
stories.fantasy_headline: Ancient Blade-Crested Beast Unearthed in the Great Sand Sea!
stories.fantasy_story: Brave alchemists exploring the Great Sand Sea have unearthed the bones of a magnificent creature. This giant beast, with a scimitar-shaped crest, once roamed the arid lands. Its discovery reveals new tales of ancient, wondrous life.

stories.original_headline: Scientists discover why high altitude protects against diabetes
stories.original_summary: Living at high altitude appears to protect against diabetes, and scientists have finally discovered the reason. When oxygen levels drop, red blood cells switch into a new metabolic mode and absorb large amounts of glucose from the blood. This helps the body cope with thin air while also reducing blo
stories.fantasy_headline: Mountain Dwellers' Secret Against the Ailing Sickness Revealed!
stories.fantasy_story: Wise alchemists have uncovered why folk living on high mountain peaks are spared the Blood Sugar Sickness. It seems their inner life essence changes in the thin air, drawing excess sweetness from their veins. This magic helps them thrive and keeps the sickness at bay.

stories.original_headline: Samsung is adding Perplexity to Galaxy AI
stories.original_summary: In addition to summoning Bixby or Gemini, Galaxy S26 users will be able to call on Perplexity by saying "hey, Plex." The integration of Perplexity into Galaxy AI is just one element of the company's embrace of a "multi-agent ecosystem." Often, people will use different AI agents for different tasks,
stories.fantasy_headline: Grand Artificers Infuse New Spirit into Star-Gazer's Oracle!
stories.fantasy_story: The Grand Artificers' Guild is weaving new magic into their Star-Gazer's Oracle, adding the curious spirit of Perplexity. Soon, those who wield these enchanted artifacts may choose from a chorus of bound spirits. Each spirit offers unique wisdom, tailored for different tasks.

stories.original_headline: You need to listen to Laurie Spiegel’s masterpiece of early ambient music
stories.original_summary: I recently had the pleasure of interviewing Laurie Spiegel for the site. As preparation for the interview, I spent a lot of time over the last couple of weeks revisiting Spiegel's records, most notably The Expanding Universe, her 1980 masterpiece that blends synth experimentalism with early examples
stories.fantasy_headline: Heed the Ancient Chimes of Spiegel's Ethereal Masterwork!
stories.fantasy_story: A revered bard, Laurie Spiegel, crafted a timeless masterpiece known as 'The Expanding Universe.' This ancient work blends magical instrumentals with soothing, ethereal melodies. Many find its enchanting sounds perfect for contemplation and inner peace.
